notable_excerpts: Energy, Manufacturing and Resources grew 0.4% quarter-on-quarter and declined 8.7% year-on-year.
We are investing significantly in leadership development. In FY25 Wipro Leadership Institute would have trained over 600 leaders.
50,000 of our employees now hold advanced AI Certification.
We remain focused in building a globally diverse team with high performance culture.
The Board of Directors approved increasing the payout percentage to 70% or above of the net income cumulatively on a block of three-year period.
The board has also declared an interim dividend of Rs. 6 per share.

chain_of_thought: The environmental disclosures were minimal, focusing on energy and resources without specific initiatives or targets. Social aspects were well-covered, highlighting employee training and diversity efforts. Governance disclosures included board decisions on dividends and remuneration, but lacked depth in other governance areas.
strengths: Strong focus on employee training and development
weaknesses: Lack of detailed governance practices beyond financial decisions
